title: Verify trial widget displays correctly on Day 0 for active trial
description: Test that the persistent trial widget with shield/clock icon and remaining days copy appears on the homepage for users with active trial on Day 0
preconditions: Current day is Day 0 of trial

steps.description: 1. Login with a user account that has an active trial on Day 0
3. Observe the trial widget in the header

expected_result: Widget displays with visual (shield/clock icon), copy 'Trial Mode: X Days Remaining. Manage Control Center →' and is persistent on page
